name: snarc
description: SNARC — salience-gated memory for Claude Code

plugins.name: snarc
plugins.description: SNARC — salience-gated memory for Claude Code. Scores every tool use on 5 dimensions (Surprise, Novelty, Arousal, Reward, Conflict) at capture time. Only stores what's salient. Automatic context injection, confidence decay, dream-cycle pattern extraction.
